name: claude-mem
description: Memory compression system for Claude Code - persist context across sessions

hooks.command:
export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v$(ls "$HOME/.nvm/versions/node" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -1)/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/version-check.js" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: version-check.js not found" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && { _W=$(cygpath -w "$_P" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$_W" ] && _P="$_W"; }; node "$_P/scripts/version-check.js"

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && [ -f "$_Q/scripts/worker-service.cjs" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: plugin scripts not found" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && { _W=$(cygpath -w "$_P" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$_W" ] && _P="$_W"; }; node "$_P/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_P/scripts/worker-service.cjs" start; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && [ -f "$_Q/scripts/worker-service.cjs" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: plugin scripts not found" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && { _W=$(cygpath -w "$_P" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$_W" ] && _P="$_W"; }; node "$_P/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_P/scripts/worker-service.cjs" hook claude-code session-init

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && [ -f "$_Q/scripts/worker-service.cjs" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: plugin scripts not found" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && { _W=$(cygpath -w "$_P" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$_W" ] && _P="$_W"; }; node "$_P/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_P/scripts/worker-service.cjs" hook claude-code observation

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && [ -f "$_Q/scripts/worker-service.cjs" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: plugin scripts not found" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && { _W=$(cygpath -w "$_P" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$_W" ] && _P="$_W"; }; node "$_P/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_P/scripts/worker-service.cjs" hook claude-code file-context

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; ls -dt "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do _R="${_R%/}"; [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/bun-runner.js" ] && [ -f "$_Q/scripts/worker-service.cjs" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: plugin scripts not found" >&2; exit 1; }; command -v cygpath >/dev/null 2>&1 && { _W=$(cygpath -w "$_P" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$_W" ] && _P="$_W"; }; node "$_P/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_P/scripts/worker-service.cjs" hook claude-code summarize

args:
_C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && printf '%s
' "$_E"; printf '%s
' "$PWD/plugin" "$PWD"; ls -dt "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/claude-mem-local/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; printf '%s
' "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/mcp-server.cjs" ] && { printf '%s
' "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: mcp server not found" >&2; exit 1; }; exec node "$_P/scripts/mcp-server.cjs"
